seoTitle: How to Use Icons With Buttons in Power BI Navigation
metaDescription: Add icons to buttons in Power BI for custom navigation that's more intuitive and visually engaging than plain text links.
intro: Plain text buttons work, but icons make navigation in a Power BI report feel more intuitive and visually engaging at a glance. This guide shows how to combine icons with buttons to build custom navigation for your dashboards. It's a simple design upgrade that helps users find their way around larger reports faster.

steps.heading: Add icons to your buttons
steps.body: Select an existing button or insert a new one, then apply an icon that visually represents its destination or function.

steps.heading: Customize button navigation
steps.body: Set the button's action to navigate to the relevant page or bookmark so it functions as a working navigation element.

steps.heading: Design for use cases in your dashboard
steps.body: Think through which pages or metrics benefit most from icon-based navigation, such as a sales dashboard with quick links to key views.

steps.heading: Automate and integrate navigation
steps.body: Where relevant, tie navigation buttons into your broader reporting workflow so users move smoothly between related reports or pages.

steps.heading: Test the navigation experience
steps.body: Click through your icon-button navigation as a viewer would to confirm it's intuitive and every button leads where expected.

faq.question: Can I use any image as an icon on a Power BI button?
faq.answer: Yes, Power BI buttons support custom icons and images, giving you flexibility in how navigation elements look.

faq.question: Do icon buttons work the same as bookmark navigation?
faq.answer: Icon buttons can be linked to bookmarks or page navigation, so they work as a visual layer on top of the same underlying navigation features.

faq.question: Why use icons instead of just text buttons?
faq.answer: Icons can be recognized faster than text, making navigation feel more intuitive, especially in dashboards with many sections.

faq.question: Is this navigation style suitable for beginners to set up?
faq.answer: Yes, it builds on standard button features in Power BI, so beginners can follow the same setup steps as with text-only buttons.

faq.question: Can icon buttons be used to jump between different reports?
faq.answer: Within a single report, icon buttons typically navigate between pages or bookmarks rather than separate report files.
